assumptions_explicit.target_unknown: Whether the Reltio acquisition will successfully boost adoption of SAP's Business Data Cloud
assumptions_explicit.assumption_text: That technical capability (Reltio's entity resolution) is the primary barrier to BDC adoption, rather than brand perception, pricing, or competitive alternatives.

assumptions_explicit.target_unknown: How the migration failure concerns will impact future sales conversations
assumptions_explicit.assumption_text: That the negative narrative can be contained and overcome with new technical successes and customer references, rather than becoming a permanent fixture in competitive displacement plays.

assumptions_explicit.target_unknown: Whether the combined solution will effectively support AI agent development as promised
assumptions_explicit.assumption_text: That 'cleansing and harmonizing data' via entity resolution is the key missing ingredient for effective business AI agents on the SAP platform, and that this value will be immediately apparent to customers.
